description.zh-Hans: 生成带硬边轮廓、落地剪影和成簇明暗的RPG像素灌木，可配置形状、枝叶密度和叶簇数量。
description.en: Generates RPG pixel shrubs with hard outlines, grounded silhouettes, and clustered shading.

triggers.zh-Hans: 灌木, 草丛, 植物, 树叶, 绿化

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成风格化的灌木丛图案，用于场景装饰或自然环境纹理。
exampleUsage.en: Generate stylized bush clusters for scene decoration or natural environment textures.
